title: Routes Workspaces
description: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Workspaces** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. This route group covers workspace discovery and top-level canonical spec tree listing only.
context: Authoritative HTTP contract (methods, paths, query, bodies, status codes) for **Routes Workspaces** under `/v1`. Handlers and OpenAPI MUST match this spec exactly so CLI, agents, and Studio stay aligned. This route group covers workspace discovery and top-level canonical spec tree listing only.

rules.requirement: GET workspaces lists orchestrated project workspaces
rules:
`GET /v1/workspaces` MUST use `ListWorkspaces` as the source of truth for workspace identity, ownership, code roots, and declaration order.

The response MAY enrich those rows with static descriptor fields from `SpecdConfig` such as `prefix` and `specsPath`, but it MUST NOT bypass `ListWorkspaces` by rebuilding the workspace list from raw config alone.

rules.requirement: GET workspace spec tree lists canonical specs without artifact bodies
rules:
`GET /v1/workspaces/{ws}/specs` MUST return the canonical spec tree for the selected workspace from `kernel.specs.list`.

Each entry MUST provide discovery metadata needed to navigate canonical specs, but this route MUST NOT inline canonical artifact bodies or per-spec detail payloads. Canonical spec detail, artifact reads, outline, context, and metadata actions belong to `api:routes-specs-read`.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: GET workspaces lists orchestrated project workspaces
scenarios.name: Workspaces endpoint returns orchestrated workspaces in declaration order
then: AND rows preserve the same workspace ordering

scenarios.requirement: GET workspaces lists orchestrated project workspaces
scenarios.name: Empty workspace config yields empty list

scenarios.requirement: GET workspaces lists orchestrated project workspaces
scenarios.name: Response may enrich orchestrated rows with descriptor fields
then: each row may include config-derived prefix or specsPath
AND the underlying workspace membership still comes from ListWorkspaces

scenarios.requirement: GET workspaces lists orchestrated project workspaces
scenarios.name: Workspace ids are stable keys for tree route

scenarios.requirement: GET workspace spec tree lists canonical specs without artifact bodies
scenarios.name: Versioned API path
when: client calls the documented route with /v1 prefix
then: AND unprefixed legacy path is not registered

scenarios.requirement: GET workspace spec tree lists canonical specs without artifact bodies
scenarios.name: Undocumented path returns 404
when: client requests a URL outside this routes contract

scenarios.requirement: GET workspace spec tree lists canonical specs without artifact bodies
scenarios.name: GET /v1/workspaces/{ws}/specs returns tree payload only
then: AND JSON body contains tree metadata without canonical artifact file bodies

scenarios.requirement: GET workspace spec tree lists canonical specs without artifact bodies
scenarios.name: Per-spec detail is not served from the tree route
when: client needs a canonical spec detail document
then: it must follow the per-spec wildcard route
AND the tree response remains a discovery payload rather than a detail payload
